query:
SELECT id, name, menuSlug FROM establishments WHERE id = 60018;
SELECT p.id, p.name, LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(p.images, '$[0]'), 120) as firstImage, p.blurPlaceholder IS NOT NULL as hasBlur FROM products p WHERE p.establishmentId = 60018 ORDER BY p.sortOrder LIMIT 30;
